message:
fix: collect errors on fan-out delivery instead of silently losing messages (gt-sog56)

sendToList returned nil on partial failure, sendToChannel discarded all
delivery errors, and mail_send.go returned early on first failure abandoning
remaining recipients. All three now collect errors from every recipient and
report partial delivery failures, matching the existing sendToGroup pattern.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
